posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: LEGO Pasta Bandit Jarrelle Augustine Arrested. He would purchase expensive boxed LEGO sets, remove valuable mini figures & select pieces, then stuff the packages with dried “durum wheat semolina pasta” before returning them for refunds. He carried out the scheme at least 70 times valued over  $34K.

link_metadata.description: A Southern California man’s alleged “brick” hustle has landed him behind bars after police say he pulled off a bizarre pasta-filled scam targeting LEGO sets.
link_metadata.title: Irvine ‘pasta bandit’ accused of swapping LEGO sets for noodles in $34K scheme
